_comment: Prefix-decidable test catalog (v8.18.29). Every feature is decidable from the token surface alone — no syntactic role, no sentence-finality, no semantic context. Annotator answers yes/no by inspecting the token string and at most one BPE leading space. Headline metric: mean F1 at sup_pre>0 on held-out test, vs probe_logits>0, vs pretrained-SAE readout>0. Calibrated/oracle F1 are diagnostics not headlines.

features.description: Token surface is exactly ',' (optionally with a single BPE leading-space prefix). Surface match only.
negative_examples: 'apple,' (comma fused with letters into one token)
exclusions: tokens that contain a comma plus other characters

features.description: Token surface is exactly '.' (optionally with a single BPE leading-space prefix). Surface match only — sentence role is irrelevant.
exclusions: tokens that contain a period plus other characters

features.description: Every visible character of the token is in 0-9; an optional BPE leading space is allowed.
exclusions: tokens with a decimal point or comma

features.description: First alphabetic character of the token (after optional BPE leading space) is in A-Z.
exclusions: tokens whose first letter is lowercase
tokens that contain no alphabetic characters

features.description: Token's first character is a literal space (the BPE word-boundary marker).
exclusions: tokens that begin with any non-space character

features.description: Token has exactly one non-whitespace character; an optional BPE leading space does not count.
exclusions: tokens with two or more visible characters

features.description: Token has at least one alphabetic character AND every alphabetic character is in a-z.
exclusions: tokens with no alphabetic characters at all

features.description: Token contains the hyphen-minus character '-' anywhere in its surface form.
